title: SA ISANG SULYAP MO TITA
Creator: Director & Writer: Armando Garces
description: Sa isang sulyap mo Tita" dubbed as one of the biggest and spectacular musical movies in the 50s and starring the country's popular reel-and real life sweetheart and husband-and-wife tandem in Philippine movie, Pancho Magalona and Tita Duran. With the backdrop and setting in the life in the navy. It looks of two Hollwood musical classics - "Anchors Aweigh" (1945) and "On the Town" (1949). Pancho Magalona and Dolphy as navy men or sailors, ala-Frank Sinatra and Gene Kelly, are in days of and they're out to have lots of fun, singing, dancing and drinking. As they say, They're out to "paint the town red

title: DALAGANG ILOCANA
Creator: Director:Olive La Torre / Writer: T.D. Agcaoili; Luciano B. Carlos; Conrado Conde
description: Dalagang Ilocana is a 1954 Filipino romantic comedy film directed by Olive La Torre from a screenplay by Luciano B. Carlos, Conrado Conde, and Willie P. Orfinada, based on a story written by T. D. Agcaoili, who also wrote additional lyrics with Conde. It stars Gloria Romero, Ric Rodrigo, and Rudy Francisco, while the supporting cast includes Dolphy and Rebecca del Rio.

title: JACK AND JILL
Creator: Director: Mar S. Torres  / Writers: Mars Ravelo; Luciano B. Carlos
description: a Filipino comedy film starring Dolphy, Lolita Rodriguez, and Rogelio de la Rosa. Directed by Mar S. Torres and written by Mars Ravelo and Luciano B. Carlos, the film is about siblings Benita (Lolita Rodriguez) and Gorio (Dolphy), who take on unconventional roles to support their father. Benita works as a jeepney driver, while Gorio handles the household chores and prefers to be called "Glory". Dolphy gained fame for this role after being typecasted .
subject: Movie

title: HONGKONG HOLIDAY
Creator: Director: Mar S. Torres /Writer: Luciano B. Carlos
description: Hongkong Holiday (1957) is a Filipino musical romantic comedy starring Gloria Romero and Dolphy, produced by Sampaguita Pictures. The plot follows Ana, a wealthy heiress who flees an arranged marriage and hides among a poor family of boat rowers. It is a classic, heartwarming film focused on romance and overcoming social class struggles.

title: JAMES BATMAN
Creator: Director & Writer: Artemio Marquez
description: An evil organization called the CLAW has threatened nuclear annihilation on the rest of the world unless all countries submit to its rule within five days. Presenting a united front, an alliance of countries tap James Bond and Batman (and Robin) to stop the threat, but both Bond and Batman play brinkmanship with each other. As the hour to doomsday winds down, the heroes are eventually forced to work together. Little do the protagonists know that the real enemy is closer than they think.

title: FACIFICA FALAYFAY

description: A young boy, Facifica is raised as a girl by his mother, Aling Kobay, who had been longing for a daughter. title: ANG TATAY KONG NANAY
Creator: Director: Lino Brocka / Writer: Orlando Nadres
description: The story revolves around Coring (Dolphy), a gay beautician who was in love with a younger man named Dennis (Phillip Salvador). Dennis had gotten his prostitute girlfriend Mariana (Marissa Delgado) pregnant, but the two couldn't handle the responsibility yet. Dennis then entrusts his child Nonoy (Niño Muhlach) to Coring, as he is set to leave the country, because he needs to work overseas to support the youngster. At first, Coring was hesitant but was easily convinced because he wants Dennis to have a better future. The child grew up with Coring and Nonoy believed that he is indeed his father. However, the story takes another turn as Mariana returns. The film tackles the hardships of being a single parent and at the same time, the judgment towards homosexuality and parenting.
subject: Movie
rights: Copyright © 1978 Lotus Films. All rights reserved.

title: JOHN EN MARSHA
Creator: Director & Writer: Ading Fernando (1973 - 1984); Apollo Arellano (1984 - 1990)
description: The classic Filipino sitcom about the mishaps of John, his wife Marsha, and their children, as he struggles in endless job hopping while being the head of the household filled with comedic antics.
